item.title: Meanwhile in France
item.description: France Just Built a Rocket Engine That Works Without Fire — And It’s a Game-Changer for Space In a high-tech aerospace lab near Toulouse, French scientists have done the unthinkable — they’ve created a rocket engine that doesn’t burn fuel. Instead, it uses rotating plasma, confined by magnetic fields, to push spacecraft with no combustion, no moving parts, and no exhaust flames. This is more than a clever tweak — it’s a brand-new class of propulsion. The system uses a spinning ring of ionized gas, driven by electromagnetic forces. Think of it as a controlled lightning storm, accelerating particles silently across space. It's precise, durable, and virtually maintenance-free. In tests, the engine delivered continuous thrust for over 1,000 hours, showing zero degradation. Unlike chemical rockets that explode fuel in seconds, this engine provides steady, efficient propulsion — ideal for satellites that need long-term orbit correction, deep-space probes, or slow interplanetary journeys. It can start or stop instantly, steer with electric precision, and function in the vacuum of space without overheating. While it currently runs on xenon, the French team is also testing argon and krypton — cheaper, lighter alternatives that open doors for mass production. Because it doesn’t rely on combustion, it sidesteps many of the costs, risks, and environmental impacts of traditional spaceflight. And that’s why France’s space agency and its EU partners are already integrating it into upcoming micro-launchers and orbital service modules. This may be the engine that finally turns the dream of long-range, low-cost space travel into a cold, quiet, electromagnetic reality. #science #france
item.dc:creator: TheTaoofRob

item.title: This subject makes so many people uncomfortable
item.description: Is it hopelessness? Fear? Is it because it's gauche, or in bad taste to talk about money? Some people don't think it's a problem. Some people admire the ultra-rich... Anyway, feel free to downvote, I know it's not a very popular subject. I'm really just interested in people's thoughts.

item.title: this is dystopian
item.description: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement detainee died by suicide while in custody after he was found hanging by his neck in the shower room at the Pennsylvania facility where he was being held, according to officials. Chaofeng had been in ICE custody for five days. He was living in New York. This was an arrest, not a conviction. If they're putting you in ICE detention for an arrest, that seems like it's skipping a major and primary step of the Justice system. Is America great again yet?
item.dc:creator: trojanbarfare

24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: I LOVE @BreathingArts work. He does the greatest illustrations. This is one of my favorites. I am a fan. Go check out more of his work in his posts and on https://www.breathing-art.com/
27 Man Tax: Gong Yoo
"Snap out of it!" - Loretta Castorini I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Seriously y'all. Coming to only comment "omg that's AI" bums me out. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out, play some trivia, talk about movies & tv and, apparently, fraps, boxer briefs and MST3k. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: The best part of the video was the grandmother
item.dc:creator: Thedingentimp

item.title: Bad news about Jasmne
item.description:
The Imgurian who adopted Jasmne and has given her an amazing life texted me the other day.
From @QuackMagicAndHerMagicalBeer: “We took Jasmne for her annual physical. Her weight is good (even with the extra treats), but the vet noticed that her remaining eye is cloudy.”
“They looked into her history and found that she lost the previous eye from feline herpes.”
“They are worried that her remaining eye may also be affected but we will need to continue to watch it to make sure it doesn't get worse. If it progresses, she will lose that eye and become a blind kitty. :( “
Quack gave birth a few months ago. Jasmne is obsessed with baby Quack and can always be found snuggling on or near her.
But the vet bills are going to be astronomical and Quack was out of work and not paid for two and a half months after giving birth.
As if all of that isn’t bad enough, Jasmne’s big brother, Ender, is also having medical issues.
From Quack: “Ender is 14 years old. He was healthy last checkup but he started vomiting and losing weight. The vet did a load of blood work and ultrasound to find that he has enlarged lymph nodes and swollen intestines.”
“We don't know if it is caused by cancer or something else. We now have to put him on a special medicine and he goes back to the vet in one month.”
Quack rescued Ender from the humane society on her birthday when he was four months old. And since Quack texted me, they had to rush him to the emergency vet because he was rapidly getting worse.
This amazing little Void is going to require a lot of medical intervention, specialists, and medication. And Quack and her hubby have that brand new baby and we all know they’re expensive.
But Quack is also very creative and has started an Etsy store selling stickers: https://www.etsy.com/shop/JasmnesStickerShop She took this AMAZING pic of her puppy Angel Food Cake and turned it into…
This! Cracks me up. I’m trying to convince her to use the proceeds of her sticker store to go towards Jasmne and Ender’s care, but she told me she is actually trying to raise money for the Humane Society, because she is a phenomenal person who always thinks of others.
She doesn’t know I’m doing this, but I wanted to share Jasmne’s and Ender’s story with you all to say…if the spirit moves you, Quack and her entire family could use some financial help. I have a ko-fi where people can donate: https://ko-fi.com/kittensfordays If anyone out there wants to help, please just note that your donation is for Quack. Thank you to everyone who made it to the end of this super long post. You are all wonderful people who seem to care about kittens as much as I do, so I just wanted to share Quack’s story.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Bambi!!
item.description:
I was at the humane society checking on the Sky Kittens and I popped in to see Bambi! They said she has been mostly hiding since getting fixed but as soon as she heard my voice she jumped up and came over to me!! I forgot how soft she is….
She is officially up for adoption! Spread the word because she needs to find her forever family!! https://ghhs.org/animal/bunny/ (Edit: the humane society refer to her as “Bunny” because they recently had a “Bambi” and didn’t want folks to get confused!!)
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
